abstract: Nikita Ivanov , Humatron AI, Founder & CEO The rapid rise of autonomous AI agents is reshaping how work gets done-but not all AI is created equal. This session unpacks the critical distinction between AI agents and AI workers in the emerging software-defined AI workforce. We’ll explore the "One Build - Many HIres" architecture, governance, and integration patterns. Attendees will gain a practical understanding of where AI agents fit, why AI workers matter for scaling, and how this paradigm shift mirrors the transition from apps to cloud-native platforms
event_title: [lu.ma/ ai registration] AI Agent SF Meetup 6

speakers.name: Jamieson Leibovitch
speakers.title: Sr. Software Engineer, Uber In this presentation we will go over Uber's Agent Platform and its inhouse Agent SDK LangFx . We'll cover how Uber thinks about how agents and some technologies built to enable agentic use cases

title: Software-Defined AI Workforce: AI Workers vs. AI Agents
